---
name: 05-generate-case-study
description: Convert the generated system into a structured architecture case study.
---

Convert this repository into an architecture case study.

Include the following sections.

Problem Statement

Describe the real-world problem the system solves.

Requirements

List functional and non-functional requirements.

Constraints

List technical or organizational constraints.

Architecture Overview

Explain the chosen architecture.

Alternatives Considered

Describe other architectures that were considered and why they were rejected.

Key Design Patterns

Explain patterns used such as:

- hexagonal architecture
- event-driven architecture
- layered architecture
- modular monolith

Deployment Model

Explain how the system is deployed and operated.

Lessons Learned

Explain strengths, weaknesses, and when this architecture would not be appropriate.
